name: nanoprinter
description: A compact molecular fabrication unit. Deploys to form a permanent appliance that can synthesize basic items from raw materials. Requires connection to a power grid to operate.

name: plastic chunk
description: A raw chunk of processed plastic suitable for molecular fabrication.

name: metal chunk
description: A raw chunk of processed metal suitable for molecular fabrication.

name: organic chunk
description: A raw chunk of processed organic material suitable for molecular fabrication.
